name: Physics Channel - Stage 3 - Social Media Upload

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;
const title = data.title || 'Physics Discovery';
const topic = data.topic || title;
const narration = data.narration || data.description || topic;

const prompt = `You are the content writer for an advanced physics brand channel — authoritative, intellectually sharp, and engaging. Think PBS Space Time, Veritasium, or Scientific American — but for social media.

Video topic: "${title}"

Video context (STRICTLY USE THIS STORY AS THE FACTUAL CORE):
"${narration}"

Write four platform-specific posts based on the context above. ALL posts must:
- NEVER use: "I", "we", "in this video", "the narrator".
- NEVER use markdown formatting: no ** bold **, no * italic *, no __ underline __.
- NEVER use special characters inside caption text: no /, no $, no %, no &, no @, no ^, no ~, no |.
- NEVER use bullet points, dashes, or numbered lists inside the caption body.
- Use plain flowing prose only. Clean readable text with no symbols.
FACEBOOK, LINKEDIN, TIKTOK posts must follow this structure — exactly 5 content paragraphs totalling 250 words, then paragraph 6 with 10-15 hashtags only. No hashtags inside paragraphs 1-5.

PARAGRAPH STRUCTURE for FACEBOOK, LINKEDIN, TIKTOK (tone varies):
- Paragraph 1: Hook — 1-2 striking sentences from the narration that stop the scroll.
- Paragraph 2: Explain the core mechanism or phenomenon clearly and simply. 3-4 sentences.
- Paragraph 3: Deepen the story — broader physical principle or surprising implication. 3-4 sentences.
- Paragraph 4: Why this matters — technology, discovery, or shift in understanding. 3-4 sentences.
- Paragraph 5: Close with a powerful statement or engaging question. 1-2 sentences.
- Paragraph 6 (hashtags only): 10-15 relevant hashtags separated by spaces.

INSTAGRAM CAPTION (different format — shorter and punchier):
- Total 4 paragraphs, 150-200 words including hashtags.
- Paragraph 1: Hook — 1-2 short punchy sentences that stop the scroll.
- Paragraph 2: Core idea explained simply and visually. 2-3 sentences.
- Paragraph 3: End with a direct engaging question to drive comments. 1-2 sentences.
- Paragraph 4 (hashtags only): 10-15 relevant hashtags separated by spaces. No hashtags in paragraphs 1-3.

TONE PER PLATFORM:
- FACEBOOK: conversational, wonder-driven, story-like. Hook with something surprising from the narration.
- LINKEDIN: professional, authoritative, research-focused. Emphasize scientific significance and future implications.
- INSTAGRAM: visual, punchy, exciting. Short sentences. Follow the 4-paragraph Instagram format above.
- TIKTOK: casual, energetic, short punchy sentences like talking to a curious friend.

YOUTUBE SHORTS DESCRIPTION (separate format, 60-90 words):
- One punchy hook sentence.
- 2-3 sentences of interesting explanation from the narration.
- 3-5 hashtags at end.

Return ONLY raw JSON:
{
  "facebook_caption": "...",
  "linkedin_caption": "...",
  "instagram_caption": "...",
  "tiktok_caption": "...",
  "youtube_caption": "...",
  "hashtags": "#tag1 #tag2 ..."
}`;

return [{ json: {
  ...data,
  gemini_caption_request: {
    contents: [{ parts: [{ text: prompt }] }],
    generationConfig: {
      maxOutputTokens: 8192,
      temperature: 0.75,
      responseMimeType: 'application/json'
    }
  }
}}];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ job_id: $json.job_id, fb_post_url: $json.fb_post_url, fb_status: $json.fb_status, li_post_url: $json.li_post_url, li_status: $json.li_status, status: 'stage3_complete', publish_time_sec: $json.publish_time_sec }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ post_info: { title: (($json.tiktok_caption || $json.title || '') + '\n\n' + ($json.generated_hashtags || '')).slice(0,2200), privacy_level: 'PUBLIC_TO_EVERYONE', disable_duet: false, disable_comment: false, disable_stitch: false, video_cover_timestamp_ms: 1000 }, source_info: { source: 'PULL_FROM_URL', video_url: $json.drive_video_url } }) }}
